meaning: <美>(楼上下之间)送饭菜的小升降机
examples: Staff access the mezzanine culinary studio via a hidden staircase behind the bar, and it is also connected to the downstairs area by a dumbwaiter.
The home includes an 870-square-foot theater with a bar and dumbwaiter, 30-foot ceilings in the living room and satellite security.
